Student profile

Primary counselling priority
How the ranking works

Explainable—not a black box

01
Academic fitEntry flexibility, pathway references and qualification-recognition complexity.
02
Financial fitIndicative tuition/living bands, sponsor wording, blocked-account and fund-history requirements.
03
Operational fitDhaka filing route, regional travel, interview, biometrics and document complexity.
04
Outcome fitWork rights, dependants and post-study options from the embedded guide.
Important: The result is a counsellor shortlist, not an admission or visa eligibility decision. Institution-level entry rules and current official immigration rules must still be checked.
